name: goodleap-playwright
description: Hybrid UI + API test automation framework using Playwright, TypeScript and BDD

scripts.test:ui: npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project='UI - Chromium' --project='UI - Firefox' --project='UI - Webkit'
scripts.test:api: npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project='API - Pet'
scripts.test:chromium: npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project='UI - Chromium'
scripts.test:firefox: npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project='UI - Firefox'
scripts.test:webkit: npx bddgen && npx playwright test --project='UI - Webkit'
